templates.description: Agent explainability analytics.  Reduced container footprint
Further updates to SPARQL and GraphQL retrieval
Multi-step cross-encoder reranker replaces LLM edge scoring in GraphRAG for faster, more accurate retrieval
Hybrid retrieval: sparse keyword (FTS5/BM25) + vector search with RRF fusion in Document-RAG
